issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.action: 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 14 勝，還差 1 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。

issues.title: support-aware core_plus_macro_plus_all_4h patch must stay visible but reference-only outside current live scope
issues.action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; the patch describes a spillover/broader lane rather than the current live scope, so do not promote it to a deployable runtime patch even though exact support is available.
issues.next_action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; the patch describes a spillover/broader lane rather than the current live scope, so do not promote it to a deployable runtime patch even though exact support is available.

issues.title: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing
issues.next_action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.
issues.action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: leaderboard comparable rows are back; keep the recent-window contract stable and cron-safe
issues.next_action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.
issues.action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.

issues.title: q15 exact support regressed back under minimum under breaker (0/50)
issues.action: Treat this as support regression, not ordinary stagnation: keep support_route_verdict/support_progress/minimum_support_rows/gap_to_minimum plus the last-supported reference visible in probe/API/UI/docs, and verify why the current bucket fell back under minimum.
